mapper.select: WITH history AS ( SELECT id, school_id, setting_key, new_value, create_time, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY school_id, setting_key, DATE(create_time) ORDER BY create_time DESC ) AS rn FROM system_setting_history WHERE deleted = 0 ), daily AS ( SELECT id, school_id, setting_key, new_value, -- 当天开始 CAST(DATE(create_time) AS DATETIME) AS start_time, -- 下一条的前一天 23:59:59，若无下一条则 2999-12-31 COALESCE( DATE_SUB(CAST(DATE(LEAD(create_time) OVER ( PARTITION BY school_id, setting_key ORDER BY DATE(create_time) )) AS DATETIME), INTERVAL 1 SECOND), '2999-12-31 23:59:59' ) AS end_time FROM history WHERE rn = 1 ) SELECT * FROM daily WHERE school_id = #{schoolId} AND setting_key = #{settingKey} AND start_time < #{semesterEndTime} AND end_time > #{semesterStartTime}
